item.title: One-click RCE on OpenClaw in under 2 hours with an Autonomous Hacking Agent | Ethiack — Autonomous Ethical Hacking for continuous security
item.description: Our AI pentester, Hackian, found a RCE on Openclaw by hacking it fully autonomously in under 2 hours. Learn how and read the logs in this blog.

item.title: "GitHub Copilot: Remote Code Execution via Prompt Injection (CVE-2025-53773)"
item.description: " This post is about an important, but also scary, prompt injection discovery that leads to full system compromise of the developer\u0026rsquo;s machine in GitHub …"

item.title: New Vulnerability in GitHub Copilot and Cursor: How Hackers Can Weaponize Code Agents
item.description: New Vulnerability in GitHub Copilot and Cursor: How Hackers Can Weaponize Code Agents

item.title: The Denylist Delusion: Cursor’s Auto-Run Leaves Agentic AI Wide Open - Backslash
item.description: In the past few months, vibe coding has taken the software industry by storm. In that time, Cursor, the AI-based code editor most synonymous with the vibe coding revolution, has rushed to build-out its product and outmaneuver its competitors.
